creator: jhelfman@e-e.com
text:
Can you please update the shar based on the latest shar I posted. I removed
the postgresql support, until there are some changes (currently in progress)
in the source code release for jasperserver. Once those changes are in
place, I will then add in the postgresql support.

As far as the version of the jdbc driver, it is the version that is packaged
with the source code. When new source code is released, it should have named
versions of the jdbc drivers, as well. That has been my experience so far.

In addition to this, I've built this in Tinderbox with no issue, but beyond
this I don't know how to build it without maven, as that is a requirement.

If you can update the shar, I can test and verify it.

-jgh
